title: Senior Doctor - Philips India Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Philips India Healthcare - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare:
Philips India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
